entry.title: Re: 404 Error in Learning Journeys
entry.content: Hello @Margit_Wagner, I am facing issue in accessing the content. A case 5000114901 has been created with SAP. can you help?

entry.title: Re: Custom Business configurations for S/4 HANA 2023 private cloud edition: Some tips & Tricks
entry.content:
Hi,

what is the equivalent to /IFWND/V4_ADMIN in public cloud edition? All necessary objects are included inside the TR but you don't have access to GUI transactions. Inside our customizing tennant all works fine, but after transporting the BC apps, they aren't showing inside the Custom Business Configuration App, because they could not be published

entry.title: Re: SAP C4C V2 Extension Scenarios on Custom Fields
entry.content: Here is the Roadmap: https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73555000100800003822&range=CURRENT-LAST#Q1%202025

entry.title: Re: Navigating Product Lifecycle Management in SAP IBP for Demand
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a way to extract all the "Product Assignments" and "Forecast dates" from the "Manage Life Cylcle" app in IBP into an excel for reporting purpose? Need to get this information daily.

entry.title: Question about 'Process Incoming VAT Invoices - China'
entry.content:
We are going to implement and estimate the effort & effect about implement SAP functions for China Full Digital e-Invoice (FDEI)  in S/4HANA. We check Help Portal, we got the following content, and there is something we are not clear, can any expert help to clarify? Our question is 'Is it possible to do the invoice verification automatically after implement the following BAdI, if the PO&item, GR quantity & value are attached to the FDEI？' Which means, whether SAP will  retrieve PO&item, GR quantity & value from FEDI and match the GR quantity & value based on PO&item in SAP, and identify the variance if there is any, then park/save (not post) SAP invoice?

“App Extensibility: Process Incoming VAT Invoices - China

  • BAdI: Mapping with Related Documents (FICN_TXI_BND_MAPPING)

    You can use this BAdI to serialize or deserialize the related documents of a VAT invoice. You can also use it to convert the business object keys for display of and navigation to the related documents, as well as get the status of the source business object.”

entry.title: Re: How to extend the SAP Gateway log in TCODE /n/IWFND/E...
entry.content:
Thank you for the quick response!

I understood where it can be configured.

However, this raises another question. Currently the log duration setting was default at 14 days but I can only check the log for one day in the first screen.

 

Does this mean the log is stored somewhere else?

entry.title: Re: MRP relevant for scheduling agreement
entry.content:
Hello,

the cumulative quantities are calculated based on your delivery schedule. You can change reset it by add a reconciliation date and an agreed quantity to reset. See screenshot.

Regards Johannes

entry.title: Re: Call for Speakers (SIT DFW) - spring 2025
entry.content:
Hi Sergio, 

Thank you for your update!

Topic: AI & ML-Driven Intelligent Condition Monitoring for Seamless Rail Operations.
Spokesperson: Srinivas Kode

Request you to please share your email ID, so I can send over the abstract.

Kindly let me know if you need anything else.

Best,
Sravya Palukuru
Email: sravya.palukuru@techwave.net

entry.title: Re: MRP relevant for scheduling agreement
Customize our solr query
entry.content: Can anyone help me in how we can Customize our solr query  which all classess we need to override

entry.title: Re: Unable to download Desktop Agent for SAP Build Proces...
entry.content: I suggest you to post another question on the community. I also confirmed that there is no option to download desktop agent for Mac. However, according to this post(https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/desktop-agent-for-mac-in-sap-process-automation/qaq-p/12820448), there used to be an option to do that.

entry.title: Re: CDS Views: retrieve a field from table joins
entry.content: Oh dear, either I'm expressing myself badly or I missed something, at what point did you hang up?

entry.title: Re: Unable to clear, remove any Input Filter after applyi...
entry.content: Have you tried the undo or even reset button from toolbar?

entry.title: Re: Sap analytics cloud copying bertween versions in model
entry.content: You don't need a advanced step for this, you only need to create copy step, selecting the source vervsion as filter.

entry.title: Re: ALTER USER Statement on HANA DB
entry.content:
Hi,

You mention the following SAP Note, 1702224 - Disable password lifetime for technical users

Please check the following:
3099056 - How to turn off the SYSTEM user password expiration
2278879 - How to check result of 'DISABLE PASSWORD LIFETIME'

Remark, SAP general recommendation regarding SYSTEM user:
SAP Help Portal - SAP HANA Administration Guide for SAP HANA Platform - The SYSTEM User
SAP Help Portal - SAP HANA Administration Guide for SAP HANA Platform - Deactivate the SYSTEM User
SAP Help Portal - SAP HANA Administration Guide for SAP HANA Platform - Resetting the SYSTEM User Password

Also can be useful:
2736167 - How to unlock/reactivate the SYSTEM user on SAP HANA?

Regards,
Laszlo

entry.title: Re: Workcenter capacity based on total hours on a period
entry.content:
Hello Maxime,

there are a lot of possibilities you can use. I am not 100% sure to understand all your requirements but here are some topics, that might help you.

You can use a reference capacity to be able to maintain one capacity to be used in several workcenter capacities (see screenshot):

If some of your employees work on different workcenters you can use pooled capacities:

In this case it is typical to have two capacities defined in a workcenter: 1: Maschine; 2: Person with pool

I hope this helps but there are a lot more possibilities using standard values keys and formulas.

Regards Johannes

entry.title: Std Bapi used to close the PO, not closing the PO line items if any one line item in a PO has GR
entry.content:
We have developed a custom program to close the open PO"s which are overdue using standard BAPI " BAPI_PO_CHANGE" by marking the delivery completed indicator for each line items based on the delivery expiry date passed.  But what we have observed is the open purchase order line items are not closed if any one line item in the PO has GR done. 

Is this a standard SAP behavior or any enhancement can be done to close the open PO line items, if the different line item of same PO had GR done

entry.title: Re: Setup and usage of contract accounts
entry.content:
Hello Henk,

we have done this set-up with different contract account types in order to invoice smart thermostats, maintenance plans and subscriptions. The main reason for this was to split the dunning and collection part of this from the commodity (E & G) part. Of course it is more master data to handle, you will not be able to meet a future requirement of 1 invoice and you need to build in some checks to avoid that these contract account types are used for Utilities contracts and that Utilities contract account types are used for SD orders / contracts. Building in this checks is quite straight-forward. 

Depending on our use cases it could also be interesting to investigate the usage of convergent invoicing with/without an integration with SAP IS-U. 

In case of any follow-up questions, don´t hesitate to reach out to me.

Cheers,

Pieter

entry.title: Value Driver Tree
entry.content:
Hello all, 

II have applied a formula to calculate the gross sales values for 2020 and 2021 in the account dimension. Since SAC does not allow referencing the same account dimension, I created a copy of the Gross Sales account dimension and labeled it as "Gross Sales Forecast." The percentage growth rate is used as a driver for calculating gross sales. However, the account dimension contains unbooked values for all years from 2018 to 2021. My objective is to observe how changes in the growth rate impact gross sales by manually inputting the growth rate in VDT. To achieve this, I have applied a formula. ITERATE(
IF(ISNULL(prior()), [H111100], prior() * (1 + [VDT0010])),
[H111100],
[d/TIME].[p/YEAR]
)

While the formula displays results for 2018 and 2019, no changes are observed when the growth rate is modified.

entry.title: Re: Architecture overview of SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC)
entry.content: Nice quick summary of what BDC is for those just starting out.

entry.title: Re: Unable to clear, remove any Input Filter after applyi...
entry.content: Hey there, I am not sure how undo will work in view mode when the end user is viewing the dashboard, but I am unaware about this reset button as it is not present in my toolbar.

entry.title: Network Questionnaire in SAP RISE deal
entry.content:
Hi .

I am the process of working in RISE deal for one of our customers and working on network questionnaire.

An ask from the customer is right now they are using MPLS connection to connect the cloud4C SAP S4 HANA Server from their branches (without VPN).  and they are planning to connect the server using the same way. Please check and let us know the possibilities and guide us on completing network questionnaire part.

Regards,
Vamsi

entry.title: Re: CDS view error Unexpected word er zxxx_c_rules
entry.content:
Ah ok. Now I see it too ...

View entities exist only from S4 2021 onwards!

In versions before that you have to define the CDS view like:

define view ZD___RULES as select from <table>

see https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/bwplaolap/3361382575.html?locale=en-US

BR, Martin

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite - TPM - B2B PassThrough Scenarios
entry.content:
From TPM generic package 2.5.0 onwards SAP has released feature to enable passThrough B2B scenario. This option is available for below type system only -

  • UN/EDIFACT
  • ASC X12

Ideally below is the case of execution -->

Step 1 --> Step1b --> Step 2 --> Step 3

For demonstration purpose I am using Process Direct at sender and receiver side. However due to certain issues in step 2 and step 3 groovy scripts used the interfaces will fail. 

Follow the steps from earlier blogs to create company/partner profile, agreement template and agreement.

While creating business transaction select a checkbox Pass-Through and activate agreement. This will create enteries in partner directory -

To trigger TPM passThrough interface, create custom IFlow 

Set Content Modifier with Headers -

SAP_COM_SND_Adapter_Type = Process_Direct

SAP_EDI_Document_Standard = ASC-X12

SAP_AS2MessageContentType = application/edi-x12 

Body - Sample X12 - 850 payload file 

PD address - to Step 1b = /tpm/b2b/sap_tpm_internal_processdirect

However when you run interface it will fail in Step 2 and step 3 due to below errors 

Error#1. Step 2 --> Groovy Step --> Set Control Numbers for Pass Through --> This is because groovy is refering to Reusable Groovy Scripts V2. However groovy is available as local script instead.

Solution :- Copy Step 2 to local workspace edit step with local groovy --> Undeply Step 2 from Standard package --> Deploy Step2 from local workspace

Error#2. Step 3 --> Error "com.sap.it.rt.adapter.processdirect.exceptions.ProcessDirectException: Failed to determine address from expression. It was found to be null." --> This is because code for Process Direct is missing in script  callPDwithHeaderParameters.groovy from Step 2 iflow

 

 

    //Process Direct
    def recProcessDirectAddress = service.getParameter("SAP_PROCESS_DIRECT_REC_Address", partnerID , String.class);
    def sndAckProcessDirectAddress = service.getParameter("SAP_PROCESS_DIRECT_SND_Address", partnerID , String.class);

 

 

This is the reason step3 not receiving PD receiver address and hence interface failing at step3.

Solution :- Update step 2 in local workspace with --> reference global script collection to older version--> redeploy step2 and run interface for testing

Run custom Iflows to trigger TPM B2B pass-through scenario successfully. Below are monitoring screenshots -

Received payload over email successfully -

 

Hope this helps the community members who are trying to enable pass-through interfaces. Let me know if you were able to implement pass-through interfaces without any issues and share your experiences.

#HappyLearning 🙂

Ref :- https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/creating-pass-through-b2b-transaction

- RJ

entry.title: Re: Sap analytics cloud copying bertween versions in model
entry.content:
Hi @Eliram_Lugassi ,

This can be accomplished using a Data Action and the copy step (no need for Advanced Formulas):

Note the filter on version has been changed here to point to the Forecast version.
Once created, you can consume the data action in a story and create a new version to contain the forecast data (e.g. previous FC). Executing the data action will prompt for the target version (e.g. the created previous FC) and copy all data (leaf-leaf, non-calculated accounts):


Hope that helps!

entry.title: Re: Data Export or Import to/from Microsoft Project in SA...
entry.content: Check out this SAP note : https://me.sap.com/notes/1326709

entry.title: Re: 2TX Scope Item
entry.content:
Hi Marius,

This response only works if you want a two-step goods receipt for every inbound delivery.  Can this be achieved for specific transactions only?

Before S/4HANA Public Cloud, I thought it would have been possible to create a custom confirmation control key that determined an alternate inbound delivery document type (maybe ELST), but that doesn't seem to be possible with public cloud customisation.   Is there a BAdI where we could do this?

We have a customer who would want this two-step goods receipt for their Transportation Managed inbound deliveries from overseas, but they are also using inbound deliveries elsewhere for goods receipts into WM managed storage locations where valuated blocked stock is not required.

ThanksRobyn

entry.title: Re: What are the steps required after changing database host name and services?
entry.content: if your DB is used as datastore, not DS repo. You can check NOTE https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/1624937

entry.title: Re: Setup and usage of contract accounts
entry.content:
Hello Pieter,

Thanks a lot for your additional information. This will also help us in making decisions.

We are aware of convergent invoicing and maybe it will have added value for us in the future, for now our focus is to create a solid basis.

Best Regards,
Henk Hoogerbrug

entry.title: Re: Data Export or Import to/from Microsoft Project in SA...
entry.content: 'Currently, no data can be retrieved. The reason for this could be a server error or a network issue.Please try again later.' -- I get this error when trying to open this note.

entry.title: SAP Custom Code Vulnerability Analysis
entry.content:
Introduction

SAP systems enable critical business processes across industries such as finance, manufacturing, healthcare, and retail. While SAP provides robust standard functionalities, many organizations rely on customizations to meet unique business requirements. However, custom code, if not properly analyzed and managed, can introduce vulnerabilities that compromise security, system performance, and compliance.

Custom Code Vulnerability Analysis is a vital process in SAP transformations, especially during migrations to SAP S/4HANA. It ensures that custom code is secure, efficient, and compliant with industry standards. This article explores the importance of custom code vulnerability analysis, its potential impacts, and how tools like KTern.AI can streamline this process.

Why Custom Code Vulnerability Analysis Matters

Custom code is often developed to address specific business needs that standard SAP functionalities cannot fulfill. However, this flexibility comes with risks. Custom code can introduce vulnerabilities that may not be immediately apparent but can have far-reaching consequences. Here’s why vulnerability analysis is critical:

  1. Security Risks: Custom code can contain hardcoded credentials, dynamic SQL queries, or improper authorization checks, making it a prime target for cyberattacks. Without proper analysis, these vulnerabilities can lead to data breaches, unauthorized access, and system compromises.
  2. Performance Bottlenecks: Poorly written or outdated custom code can cause inefficiencies, such as slow database queries, memory leaks, or excessive use of nested loops. These issues can degrade system performance, impacting business-critical operations.
  3. Compliance Violations: Custom code that does not adhere to regulatory standards like GDPR, SOX, or ISO can result in non-compliance, leading to legal penalties, fines, and reputational damage.
  4. Migration Challenges: During SAP S/4HANA transformations, custom code that is not analyzed for compatibility can cause migration failures, increased costs, and delays. Legacy code that is no longer relevant can also clutter the system, making the migration process more complex.

The Impact of Unaddressed Custom Code Vulnerabilities

Ignoring custom code vulnerabilities can have severe consequences for organizations. Here are some of the key impacts:

1. Security Breaches

Custom code vulnerabilities are a common entry point for cyberattacks. For example:

  • Hardcoded Credentials: Storing usernames and passwords directly in the code can expose sensitive information if the code is accessed by unauthorized users.
  • SQL Injection: Dynamic SQL queries without proper input validation can be exploited to manipulate databases, leading to data theft or corruption.
  • Unauthorized Access: Missing or improper authorization checks can allow unauthorized users to access sensitive data or perform critical transactions.

2. System Instability and Performance Issues

Custom code that is not optimized can lead to:

  • Slow Processing Times: Inefficient database queries or excessive use of loops can slow down system performance, affecting user experience and productivity.
  • System Crashes: Memory-intensive operations or poorly managed resources can cause system instability, leading to downtime and operational disruptions.

3. Compliance and Regulatory Risks

Non-compliant custom code can result in:

  • Data Privacy Violations: Failure to encrypt sensitive data or adhere to data protection laws like GDPR can lead to legal penalties.
  • Audit Trail Gaps: Custom code that does not maintain proper audit trails for critical transactions can make it difficult to track and verify activities, leading to compliance issues.

4. Increased Costs During Migrations

Custom code that is not analyzed before an SAP S/4HANA migration can:

  • Cause Migration Failures: Incompatible or obsolete code can lead to migration errors, requiring additional time and resources to resolve.
  • Increase Maintenance Costs: Legacy code that is no longer relevant can clutter the system, making it harder to maintain and increasing long-term costs.

The Solution: Proactive Custom Code Vulnerability Analysis

To mitigate these risks, organizations must adopt a proactive approach to custom code vulnerability analysis. This involves:

  1. Inventorying Custom Code: Identify and catalog all custom developments in the SAP landscape, including reports, function modules, classes, and other objects.
  2. Automated Scanning: Use tools to automatically scan custom code for vulnerabilities, such as security flaws, performance issues, and compliance gaps.
  3. Prioritizing Risks: Focus on high-impact vulnerabilities that pose the greatest threat to security, performance, or compliance.
  4. Remediation and Optimization: Address identified issues by fixing vulnerabilities, optimizing inefficient code, and removing obsolete objects.
  5. Continuous Monitoring: Implement regular scans to ensure that custom code remains secure and compliant over time.

Automate Custom Code Vulnerability Analysis

Automation plays a crucial role in simplifying and enhancing the custom code vulnerability analysis process. By leveraging tools like KTern.AI, organizations can adopt a data-driven approach to identify, prioritize, and remediate vulnerabilities effectively. Here’s how automation transforms this process:

1. Security Risk Assessment

Security is a top priority in Custom Code Vulnerability analysis. Automation tools like KTern.AI provide:

  • Identification of Hard-Coded User Credentials: Flags static usernames and passwords in the source code, preventing unauthorized access.
  • Detection of Directory Traversal Vulnerabilities: Ensures that malicious actors cannot exploit path manipulation vulnerabilities.
  • Dynamic Procedure Calls in ABAP: Detects unsafe dynamic calls that could lead to code injection risks.

Value Added: Strengthens the SAP security posture and prevents data breaches before they occur.

2. Object-Specific Analysis

Organizations often struggle to pinpoint which parts of their code need attention. Automation tools offer:

  • Categorization by Object Type: Classifies vulnerabilities by program, function module, class, etc., helping teams prioritize issues efficiently.
  • Tracking of Code Changes by User & Developer: Enhances accountability and improves change management.

Value Added: Provides better visibility into code complexity and ownership, ensuring effective remediation strategies.

3. Exemption & Compliance Status

Not all vulnerabilities require immediate fixes. Automation tools enable:

  • Exemption Tagging for Specific Vulnerabilities: Documents valid exceptions for audit purposes.
  • Assignment of Responsible Contacts for Resolution: Improves collaboration by assigning owners to remediation tasks.

Value Added: Streamlines compliance reporting and ensures security risks are managed without unnecessary noise.

4. Timestamped Issue Tracking

Monitoring the evolution of vulnerabilities is crucial for long-term improvement. Automation tools provide:

  • First Occurrence & Latest Detected Timestamping: Tracks the historical presence of issues.
  • Trend Analysis for Vulnerability Growth: Assesses whether security risks are increasing or decreasing over time.

Value Added: Helps organizations measure progress in security improvements and avoid recurring vulnerabilities.

Conclusion

Unaddressed vulnerabilities in custom code can lead to security breaches, performance issues, compliance violations, and increased costs during migrations. By adopting a proactive approach and leveraging automation tools, organizations can identify and mitigate these risks effectively.

For businesses preparing for SAP S/4HANA migrations, custom code analysis is a critical step to ensure a seamless and secure transition. It not only safeguards the system but also optimizes performance and ensures compliance with industry standards. In an era where cybersecurity threats and regulatory requirements are constantly evolving, investing in custom code vulnerability analysis is essential for long-term success.

By prioritizing this process, organizations can future-proof their SAP environments, ensuring they remain resilient, efficient, and compliant in the face of changing business and technological landscapes. Automation tools like KTern.AI provide the necessary insights and capabilities to streamline this process, making it easier for organizations to achieve their SAP transformation goals.

entry.title: Re: MRP relevant for scheduling agreement
entry.content: Hello Johannes, is there az link that zou can provide detaled version regarding cummulative quantities for suppliers

entry.title: Re: Post in local currency with BAPI_ACC_GL_POSTING_POST
entry.content:
Hello @JozsefSzikszai ,

I know this is a very old post from you. but would still like to get some clarity on your above answer.

We are using BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST to migrate GL Balances from Legacy ECC system to S4/HANA. Where we need to also migrate the amount in Group currency (Curr Type 30). But in the ECC system we do not have that data (amount) available. So, we want the system to calculate the amount using exchange rates. 

In that case if I understood your explanations correctly, you are suggesting only to pass ITEMNO_ACC & CURRENCY parameters (No need to pass CURR_TYPE & AMT_DOCCUR). 

With that in my case I am getting an error of RW018: FI/CO interface: Currency item entered several times even though ITEMNO_ACC is different.
While I was trying, if I pass ITEMNO_ACC, CURRENCY & CURR_TYPE (And leave AMT_DOCCUR blank) then it does not give me the particular error (RW018).

I wanted to check with you if this is correct or would you suggest something different?


Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Setup and usage of contract accounts
entry.content:
Hello Henk,

You are welcome. Good luck with your decisions and the solid base!

Regarding CI: here a link to an interesting blog post of my colleague Oleh: SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management: com... - SAP Community

Cheers,

Pieter

entry.title: Re: Issue with SAP BTP SDK for Android (v24.4.3) After App Termination and Re-launch
entry.content:
What kind of Authentication type has been configured for your application? OAuth or SAML2?
And could you describe more for your mobile application, eg. after you application is re-launched, do you immediately open the WebView to access UI5 application? is your client access UI5 application via Mobile Service Destination? 
If possible, please capture some network trace from client side and share it with us.

entry.title: Re: Latest goals management - Introduction description de...
entry.content: Dear customer, Good day! Currently the user is only able to see the expanded introduction field when the goal plan is first launched and no goals are in their plans. However when a user adds a new goal to their plan, the introduction field automatically collapses and you manually have to expand the introduction field to read the business requirements for setting goals.  But the product manager has commented in the influence 277610 that the feature will be enhanced in 2505. Enhancement details: Remember the last state that the Introduction is on, if it was expanded before, it will be expanded the next time upon entry. Thank you. Best Regards,​ Makki SAP Support

entry.title: SAP C4C Make Location access mandatory while login in to the system via mobile app
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

We have a requirement that in C4C Mobile application user should not be able to login into the system(application) if they don't have access to the location or their location is turned off. We are unable to make this as mandatory . Any help on this is much appreciable.

 

Best Regards,

Sourav S.

entry.title: Creation of custom roles for Cloud ALM (eg. restrict Transport creation, restrict feature creation)
entry.content:
In Cloud ALM, is there a way to mix and match authorization so that we can create our own roles? There is a SAP note about the creation of custom role collections and roles, but there is no specific information on how to create the role in Cloud ALM perspective.

For example, if we want to restrict creation of Features, creation of Transports, or creation of Transport of copies, how can this be achieved, or can this be achieved? Or are we just limited on the SAP standard roles provided?

regards,

Luigi

#sapcloudalm #calm #cloudalm

entry.title: Red lines in Inventory Value Report SAP Business One
入门教程：如何将 SAP Digital Boardroom 数字化董事会资产迁移到演示模式（下）
entry.content:
随着SAP Analytics Cloud 资产的简化，SAP Digital Boardroom（SAP 数字化董事会议厅）的核心功能已集成到统一故事中。因此，SAP Digital Boardroom 的某些功能经过战略性考量后将要被精简或者替代。 

让我们来探讨这些非战略性功能，以及在优化故事体验的演示模式中如何通过适当的替代方法实现这些功能。如果您对如何正确的迁移您的数字化董事会资产感兴趣，请参考本系列的第一篇文章。 

议程模式 

过去，用户使用数字化董事会的议程功能的一个主要问题是，用户在浏览时只能看到特定议程中的主题，限制了他们对其他议程中主题的了解。此外，用户在切换不同议程中的主题时，需要返回到Digital Boardroom的结构中，选择一个议程，然后再选择主题。 

SAP Analytics Cloud 经过战略性考量，决定不整合 SAP Classic Digital Boardroom中固有的议程功能。这一决策在以下几个方面显著提升了演示模式： 

  • 平衡结构与灵活性：允许受众在需要时偏离主题。 
  • 动态演示流程：能够根据受众或会议的焦点调整演示流程。 

通过摒弃僵化的议程风格，演示模式如今提供了一种更具适应性和用户友好的方式，更能满足多样化观众的需求以及不断变化的会议情境。这种灵活性确保演示能够更具吸引力，并且能够更好地回应观众的兴趣和问题。 

 

会议纪要 

在优化故事体验的演示模式中，我们不再使用会议纪要的概念。我们集成了留言功能，允许用户记录行动事项。这些留言也可以在其他模式下查看。 

对于希望记录完整会议笔记的用户，目前许多在线平台（如Microsoft Teams、Zoom和Google Meet）都支持实时转录功能。这将帮助用户轻松记录整个会议的转录内容。 

 

根主题 

在 Classic Digital Boardroom 仪表盘中，默认情况下，第一个主题被标记为根主题。随着演示内容的增加，如何更改根主题并对流程进行重新排序对于用户来说似乎是一项困难。 

为了解决这一问题，我们在演示模式中引入了简化的单通道主题和子主题结构。这种新结构使用户能够更高效地设计演示流程。通过直观的拖放界面，用户可以轻松添加和重新排列页面及主题，确保演示流程能够满足观众的需求。 

使用拖放功能重新排列主题 

 

右键单击上下文菜单 

数字化董事会的“右键单击”上下文菜单的设计重点在于支持触摸操作。迁移后，用户在优化故事的演示模式中的可以使用快速操作菜单来支持触摸操作，并且可以完全自定义。设计者可以在查看故事时，选择在视图模式和演示模式下可用的选项。  

 

在多个主题/子主题中重复使用页面 

转换后，在新的演示模式仅允许在主题或子主题中使用页面，以实现与其他模式之间的无缝过渡。这种设计还有助于我们在视图模式和演示模式中提供一致的创新功能，例如书签默认页面，从而降低用户的学习曲线。 

多通道设置 

大多数客户在使用SAP Analytics Cloud时，通常会使用超宽显示器或在各种虚拟会议平台上进行分享。对于需要使用多屏幕显示器的客户来说，这已经让他们进行了一些投资。我们在设计演示模式时充分考虑了这一战略的优先级。 

使用宽显示器（如4K或8K）作为扩展显示的客户，可以通过新的高级响应式布局或画布页面中的流式布局面板实现三通道显示。流式布局面板使用户能够添加水平和垂直滚动。 

以下是设置方法的快速演示： 

在页面上添加流式布局面板，该面板可在资产面板中的“容器”部分找到。 

我的目标是实现一个三屏设置，因此我将在页面上添加三个流式布局面板。每个流式布局面板的宽度设置为12格，以确保每个通道的宽度一致。 

多通道布局 

该演示显示，每个通道都充当一个故事页面，其中包含必要的过滤器、输入控件和交互功能。 

这种方法的最佳部分是，随着屏幕尺寸的变化，高级响应式布局会自动调整整个页面的大小并显示仪表盘。 

注意：在未遵循性能优化最佳实践的情况下可能会导致性能问题。 

 

跳转导航 

在SAP Analytics Cloud演示模式中，所有导航都是通过超链接实现的。通过超链接，客户可以轻松选择并传递内部目标的上下文过滤器。未来的发展方向是通过超链接处理所有导航。 

 

标签布局 

为了提供无干扰的查看体验，我们决定在新的演示模式中省略页眉和页脚。这意味着标签布局在演示模式中不可用。如果您仍然希望模拟这种设置，我们可以在页面中使用选项卡条，并在每个选项卡条中设计每个页面的内容。 

这与导入页面不同，因为在这里，设计者设计的是每个选项卡条中的页面。 

 

 

以下是一个使用选项卡条设计页面时的演示效果。 

选项卡条 

 

SAP Analytics Cloud 资源  

关于故事与分析应用程序的统一，更多信息请参阅Jie Deng的博客文章。  

关于演示模式是什么以及如何进一步自定义，更多信息请参阅Tunir Kapil的博客文章。  

  

  

原文链接：How to migrate SAP Classic Digital Boardroom asset... - SAP Community 

原作者：Vivek-Varma

entry.title: Re: Generate unique email adresses during the hire process
entry.content:
Hi  @inepre1 

You shall able to active this via business rule itself, follow the below attached screenshot. And you shall able to change the email address based on name or initial of the name.

 

Add the rule in Navigation path: EC->Admin Tools-> Search for “Manage Business Configuration”-->Emailinfo, under trigger rule set eventtype as "oninit".

Thanks

Arun

entry.title: Re: SAP Custom Code Vulnerability Analysis
entry.content:
Great blog! Thanks for sharing.

Code vulnerability and code quality are crucial aspects of any modernization journey, as they can become significant blockers for organizations trying to break free and open doors for innovations. To stay ahead, we should conduct these checks at least quarterly and adopt a shift-left approach to code optimization.

entry.title: Re: Navigating Product Lifecycle Management in SAP IBP for Demand
Re: Navigating Product Lifecycle Management in SAP IBP for Demand
entry.content:
Hey @Sivakumar_ASK 

Yes, in SAP Integrated Business Planning (IBP), you can export Product Assignments and Forecast Dates from the Manage Product Lifecycle app into an Excel file. This is useful for daily reports. Here’s how you can do it:

1. Open the "Manage Product Lifecycle" App

  • Go to the SAP IBP Fiori Launchpad.
  • Select the "Manage Product Lifecycle" app.

2. Export the Data

  • Product Assignments:
    • Open the "Product Assignments" tab.
    • Click "Download" to save the data as a CSV file.
  • Forecast Dates:
    • Go to the "Forecast Dates" tab.
    • Click "Download" to export the forecast data.

3. Automate the Daily Export

If you need this data daily, you can set up an Application Job in SAP IBP to export it automatically and save it to a specific location.

For step-by-step instructions on how to create and schedule an Application Job, check the SAP Help Documentation:
👉Creating and Monitoring Application Jobs in SAP IBP

entry.title: Re: KCH2 PROFIT CENTRE GROUP CTREATION
entry.content:
Hi James,

The error "Function is not allowed in the standard hierarchy" in KCH2 (Profit Center Group Creation) usually occurs when you try to modify the Standard Hierarchy instead of creating a new Profit Center Group. In ECC, the Standard Hierarchy is predefined and maintained through Transaction KCH1 (not KCH2).

Possible Solutions:

Ensure You're Not Modifying the Standard Hierarchy: Use KCH1 for standard hierarchy changes and KCH2 for creating custom Profit Center Groups.
Check Authorization: Ensure you have the required authorization object (K_HIER_BUK) to modify Profit Center hierarchies.
Verify Profit Center Assignment: If a Profit Center is already assigned to another hierarchy, you may need to remove it first.
Use Transaction KCH3: To view existing hierarchies and confirm their structure before making changes.

 

GenAI was used to help generate this content.

entry.title: Is it possible to adopt the language setting from WorkZone in an App built using SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
I have an app built using SAP Build Apps which is published to SAP Build Work Zone. Is there a way to set the language of the app to the langauge setting in SAP Build Work Zone? 

I tried to process the standard URL parameter set by SAP Build Work Zone, sap-locale, to set systemVars.i18n.currentLanguage. But the app does not appear to be receiving this parameter in systemVars.initialUrl eventhough it is set by SAP Build Work Zone. If I set this parameter in preview, the app is receiving the parameter.

entry.title: Re: KCH2 PROFIT CENTRE GROUP CTREATION
entry.content: The part "Check Authorization" of your answer is not relevant, but it's typical from GenAI answers. If you used it, add a warning as explained in https://pages.community.sap.com/resources/rules-of-engagement: "If you want to publish content that was helped/created by GenAI, you must add the user tag GenAI Assisted Content. For content where it's not possible to add a user tag (e.g., answers), you must include this statement: "GenAI was used to help generate this content." Apologies if you didn't (humans start thinking like GenAI then...)

entry.title: Unit price with GST and remove GST from that price SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Good day!

We would like to set up specific functionality for one particular item group in SAP Business One. Please refer to the scenario below for a better understanding:

Scenario:

  • We have an item with a unit price of 600 INR.
  • A 50% discount is applied, bringing the new unit price to 300 INR after the discount.
  • When 18% IGST is selected as a tax code, the calculation should work as follows:
    1. The price before discount (before applying GST) is calculated as:
      • 300 INR - 18% (GST) = 254 INR.
    2. The user will apply 18% IGST on the 254 INR.
    3. The total document value should be:
      • 254 INR × 18% (GST) = 299.72 INR.

We require this setup to only apply to one specific item group and ensure the system follows the above logic when creating sales orders for items within this group.

Could you please guide us on how to configure this setup in SAP Business One? If customization or further actions are needed, kindly provide the necessary steps or suggestions.

How can i handle?

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: How to disable Export option in SAC Data Analyzer based on SAP BEx query
entry.content:
Hi,

How to disable Export option in SAC Data Analyzer based on SAP BEx query

entry.title: Best Practice: Repairing a Failed SAP Instance (Part 3 – Repair a failed ABAP dialog instance)
entry.content:
In the first part and second part of this blog series, I presented common issues that lead to a failed SAP Start Service and a failed SAP instance. Now, I want to talk about some specifics that can lead to a failed SAP ABAP instance on Windows Server. This blog is inspired by real life scenarios we saw in development support.

Out of virtual memory

Out of memory situations can manifest in various ways and occur in different locations. In this example, the start of the ABAP instance is affected:

Inspecting the work process table, startup of many work processes was not possible:

Here, a detailed look inside one of the trace files of a failed work processes that can be found in the work directory of the instance (in my case C:\usr\sap\RA1\DVEBMGS01\work), reveals the root cause:

M calling db_connect ...
B Loading DB library 'C:\usr\sap\RA1\DVEBMGS01\exe\dbmssslib.dll' ...
M *** ERROR => DlLoadLib()==DLENOACCESS - LoadLibrary("C:\usr\sap\RA1\DVEBMGS01\exe\dbmssslib.dll")
Error 1455 = "The paging file is too small for this operation to complete." [dlnt.c 322]
B *** ERROR => Couldn't load library 'C:\usr\sap\RA1\DVEBMGS01\exe\dbmssslib.dll'

Error 1455 is very prominent on Windows and can also occur during operations and lifecycle operations. In most cases the root-cause can be found with the memory configuration/sizing of the system. Please make sure you have a large enough pagefile configured. The size of the pagefile should be at least equal the size of RAM.

If you want to run an ABAP instance without a pagefile (what I generally do not recommend), you must adjust the profile parameter "PHYS_MEMSIZE".

More information about memory configuration and sizing on Windows can be found inside SAP Note 88416.

Misconfiguration of SAPLOCALHOST

SAPLOCALHOST is a well-known profile parameter that can also be specified by an environment variable of the <SID>adm / SAPService<SID> users. In case a wrong hostname is passed, either due to a typo or by specifying the wrong hostname, virtual hostname, or additional hostname, the related service cannot start.

SAP MMC shows that the service is not running:

Accessing the Windows Application Log using the Event Viewer, we find the following information:

Error:     Unable to change to Directory \\Wrong-Hostname\saploc\RA1\DVEBMGS01\work.
              (Error 53 ERROR_BAD_NETPATH: The network path was not found.) 

At a glance, it is evident that the wrong hostname is being used inside the UNC path: \\wrong-hostname. Of course, a real life scenario might look a little bit trickier. Here, trying to access the directory by a simple "dir" or "cd" might help to pinpoint the issue.

In our case, the root cause for this mess can be found inside the instance profile:

Be cautious when specifying a different SAPLOCALHOST hostname than the Windows hostname.
A typo or misconfiguring a virtual/additional hostname can result in a system down.

Connection issue to database

The next problem category focuses on connection problems of work processes to the database. Again, these types of issues can manifest in various ways. In our case, the instance is down because the Dispatcher stopped:

Looking inside the trace file of the Dispatcher (dev_disp) inside the work directory of the affected instance. We see that the Dispatcher was able to start all work processes. However, all of them terminated after a few seconds, and the dispatcher eventually gave up.

The root cause for this behavior can be found inside the trace file of one of the failed work processes, here we look into dev_w0:

ERROR: -1 in function SQLConnectWithRetry (SQLConnectWithRetry) [line 3281]
[Microsoft][ODBC Driver 13 for SQL Server]TCP Provider: No such host is known.

In this example, the wrong DB hostname has been specified in default.pfl.

As mentioned earlier, there can be many root causes for connection problems to the DB. Some of them are:

  1. Wrong parameters specified in default.pfl profile:
    SAPDBHOST = WSIVQIT01CS-1
    dbms/type = mss
    dbs/mss/server = WSIVQIT01CS-D
    dbs/mss/dbname = RA1
    dbs/mss/schema = ra1
    Please note that some parameters are case-sensitive, for example dbs/mss/schema.
    If you specify dbs/mss/schema = RA1 , the DB client cannot connect to the database!
  2. Actual loss of network connectivity. For example a firewall blocking traffic between the application and the database host.
  3. Unavailability of the database. It might be simply not started or have serious performance issues.

Communication issue with the Message Server

If the database connection has been established and the Dispatcher wants to inform the Message Server that the instance has been started, communication with the Message Server might not be possible. In this case, where the Message Server cannot be reached, startup of the instance will fail. Here, SAP MMC shows a failed Dispatcher:

Inspecting the trace file of the dispatcher we find the root-cause:

dev_disp
DP_FATAL_ERROR => DpTriggerMsAttach: hostname 'WSIVQIT01CS--S' of parameter 'rdisp/mshost' unknown
DISPATCHER EMERGENCY SHUTDOWN ***

In our scenario, a typo was introduced in the 'rdisp/mshost' profile parameter.

Good:  WSIVQIT01CS-S
Bad:     WSIVQIT01CS--S     (two -- chars)

Communication issue with the Enqueue Server

We already talked about the Message Server. Of course, the connection to the Enqueue Server might affected as well. Here, the issue might manifest in a state where the instance remains in Status "Starting ..." forever:

Sometimes the start of the instance is successful but when users try to actually use the system, the instance fails.

Again, the root cause for this kind of issues has many faces. In our scenario, we passed the wrong hostname:

dev_w0 trace
ERROR => EncCliCon:hostname WSIVQIT01CS-E unknown
ERROR => ENSA_GetComBuffer: ENSA_Connect() ,connect to enqueue server failed.

Start problems related to the ABAP secure store

The last class of issues I want to focus on are start problems related to issues with the ABAP secure store. In this case, the corresponding files might simply be inaccessible. Either because SAPServiceSID has not the necessary permissions or a wrong file path specified inside the profiles.

Default.pfl
rsec/ssfs_datapath = $(DIR_GLOBAL)$(DIR_SEP)security$(DIR_SEP)rsecssfs$(DIR_SEP)data
rsec/ssfs_keypath = $(DIR_GLOBAL)$(DIR_SEP)security$(DIR_SEP)rsecssfs$(DIR_SEP)key

Please note that those directories can also be specified through the Windows environment of the <SIDadm> / SAPService<SID> user:

RSEC_SSFS_DATAPATH=\\WSIVQIT01CS-S\sapmnt\RA1\SYS\global\security\rsecssfs\data
RSEC_SSFS_KEYPATH=\\WSIVQIT01CS-S\sapmnt\RA1\SYS\global\security\rsecssfs\key

Related errors can be found in dev_w* trace files.

 

By addressing these common pitfalls, you can enhance the stability and reliability of your SAP ABAP instances on Windows Server. Remember, attention to detail in configuration can prevent many of these issues.

Feel free to share your experiences or ask questions in the comments below. Your insights could help others facing similar challenges!

entry.title: Need guidance on how do we integrate shopping assistant with in storefront
entry.content:
Need assistance on how to combine shopping assistant with in-storefront after obtaining a SAP CX AI Toolkit subscription.

https://api-usea-prod.cxai.cloud.sap/assistant/v1/shopping/config

Instead of receiving a success answer, I received an org and user error.

entry.title: Re: Exception during start of deployment for deploy type...
entry.content:
Hi Ravi,

Unfortunately the response you get from "Check destination" is not reliable. Still the configuration of the destination might be wrong.

We have SAP Note for this describing a similar error and solution: https://me.sap.com/notes/3199852. Please kindly check the steps described in the note.

If the destination is pointing to the deploy service and is configured with Basic Auth please also check this note: https://me.sap.com/notes/3199852

Hope this helps,

Sven

entry.title: Re: Finding largest tables in Oracle 12c database
entry.content: In filters select TYPE as a TABLE

entry.title: Re: TBB1 Posting at future date
entry.content: asdfghjkl;';p7654q2

entry.title: SAP Datasphere News in February
entry.content:
Another month with great new features ✨

The announcement of SAP Business Data Cloud made quite some noise and puts data, analytics and AI at the center of our portfolio. Learn more in my short top feature video or more details in my overview session on YouTube 📺

In addition, explore the latest updates in our community news blogs and enjoy watching my top feature highlights for February 2025 on YouTube.

 

 

Recap of the SAP Business Unleashed Event

In case you have missed the amazing virtual SAP Business Unleashed event on February 13, 2025 with our board members Christian Klein and Muhammad Alam you can watch the event replay. You learn how to integrate and optimize every part of your business, witness the launch of a brand-new solution that connects and harmonizes all your data and explore how Joule, our copilot, deploys AI agents across your organization. 
👉 Watch the event replay

🔗 Watch my SAP Business Data Cloud overview session on YouTube

 

My top features in February

 

SAP Datasphere integrated into SAP Cloud ALM for Health Monitoring

SAP Datasphere is now integrated into SAP Cloud ALM for health monitoring, which enables you to check the health of your one or more SAP Datasphere tenants from the Health Monitoring app in SAP Cloud ALM. 
More information.

 

Import or Export IP Allowlist

We extended the IP allowlist UI with import and export buttons allowing you to export a file that lists all allowlisted IPs and their descriptions. You can also import an externally produced file and update the allowlist with APPEND or an OVERWRITE option.
This feature allows you to manage your IP allowlist by importing or exporting your it to the same or a different SAP Datasphere tenant, and avoids the handling hundreds of IPs manually, which could make the process much less prone to errors.
More information.

 

Delete Records From Your Delta Capture Local Table

From the table editor, some enhancements have been made to help you with housekeeping on already processed data changes. For local tables where delta capture is enabled, you can now delete records as follows:

  • Delete all records: All records contained in your table will be physically deleted.
  • Delete all records (Mark as "Deleted)= All records contained in your table will take the change type "D" but can still be processed by other apps until they are permanently deleted.
  • Delete all records marked for deletion which are older than the specified number of days: Based on the defined number of days, all fully-processed records with change type "D" will be permanently deleted.

More information

 

 

Convergence of the SAP Datasphere Catalog and the Data Marketplace Tabs

With the launch of SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC), the Data Catalog and the Data Marketplace tabs within SAP Datasphere have been unified under a single tab, called 'Catalog & Marketplace'. It remains the go-to place for all your data needs within SAP Datasphere and serves as the central data hub for powerful insight apps, data products and assets in SAP BDC. This change becomes available with release 2025.05 of SAP Datasphere.
More information.

 

SAP Datasphere Tenant migration

There are several reasons that might require the need for migrating an SAP Datasphere tenant. You might want to change your hyperscaler or data center, change to a new commercial model of SAP Datasphere or SAP Business Data Cloud, and others.

@thorebedey and Nils Henk from SAP consulting recognized this challenge. They have developed a specialized service that simplifies and streamlines the migration of a Datasphere tenant to a new environment and describe this in their blog SAP Datasphere Tenant migration made possible.

 

 

More blogs to check out 👇

  • SAP Datasphere Tenant migration made possible
  • Loop control using SQLScript view, Data Flow script operator & Open SQL procedure in SAP Datasphere
  • Beginner's guide to Data Flows in SAP Datasphere: A step by step approach
  • Ensuring Data Consistency in the Extraction of SuccessFactors Data to SAP Datasphere
  • An earlier article on 'SAP Datasphere Security & Data Access Controls' receives an update
  • Data Transpose in SAP Datasphere using Union Operation
  • Dynamic Stock Calculation in SAP Datasphere: Handling Non-Cumulative Stock Movements | S/4 IM
  • SAP BTP: “Change Agent” or “Scale Agent” Part 7 – How to select Data & Analytics BTP Services
  • 3 Reasons to Register for the SAP Business Data Cloud Primer in 30 Minutes Webinar
  • Deliver AI value across your business with DataRobot Insight Apps for SAP
  • Datasphere - Populating Dynamic Default Values in Analytical Model Variables
  • Announcing the Water Track at the SAP for Energy and Utilities Conference 2025
  • End to End Designing the Multilevel Hierarchy in Datasphere
  • TCQ - Mastering complex data with SAP Datasphere

 

Find more information and related blog posts on the topic page for SAP Datasphere. You will find further product information on our Community with various subpages about Business Content, the SAP BW Bridge as well as content for Best Practices & Troubleshooting. Also check out the new support content for SAP Datasphere on SAP Help for troubleshooting and analysis guides, how-to guides, technical details, and more.

Find out how to unleash the power of your business data with SAP’s free learning content on SAP Datasphere. It’s designed to help you enrich your data projects, simplify the data landscape, and make the most out of your investment. Check out even more role-based learning resources and opportunities to get certified in one place on  SAP Learning site.

entry.title: Re: CDS Views: retrieve a field from table joins
entry.content:
I believe you should check which CDS-views / Services are at your disposal in your SAP-System (S/4?) ...
We can't interprete what the structure of CDS-view "ZI_MAINTENANCENOTIFICATION_EXT" is.

From my point of view, I would suggest looking into the following Stdrd. CDS-views (on recent S/4HANA environments), in order of relevance :

  • I_PurOrdAccountAssignmentAPI01
  • I_PurOrdAccountAssignment
  • I_PurchaseOrderAPI01
  • I_PurchaseOrder
  • I_MaintenanceOrder

If you would have the availability of "I_PurOrdAccountAssignmentAPI01" CDS, this would probably be ideal ... This CDS holds associations "_PurchaseOrder" and "_PurchaseOrderItem" and there is a Parameter "OrderID" coming from the association "I_PurOrdAccountAssignment"-CDS ...

So with some luck you would have a direct link in a SAP-stdrd CDS for your MaintenanceOrder as input ("OrderID" - "AUFNR") and the PurchaseOrder data ...

Please check the SAP-Help on CDS views related to Purchase Orders indicating your correct ERP-version ...

Hope this helps

Nic T.

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer Challenge March - SAP Community Escape House - AI 🤖🧠
entry.content:
That was really fun, and I even learned a little something. 

Not too hard, but still required a little thought (and for me a little help from my friends 🎶). And the spider was cute.

entry.title: Re: Issue with : Perform Maintenance Jobs without assignm...
entry.content: Hi Tim, your answer has been very helpful. That is the answer i was looking for. Thanks a lot

entry.title: Re: How to disable 1st and 4 th option scc4 tcode when op...
entry.content:
Hello,

I don't think that there is a possibility except a modification / enhancement - which I would strongly recommend not to do.

My advise would be: contact the requester of this. I guess this request has its origin in some kind of exaggerated need for security. As (AFAIK) there is no other way than a modification / enhancement to implement this, I would evaluate risks out of this modification / enhancement as bigger than leaving it as it is. Suggest a monitoring function for this instead - with this you will remain in the SAP standard and avoid that you possibly shoot yourself in the foot with an own-made restriction in a really important and neuralgic function which the client setting is. And what about having a little trust in the SAP basis admins (as no other people should have the authorization to change the client settings)? 

A monitoring can be set up e.g. by using the Security Audit Log, checking entries for event EU2. An alternative could be a report, scheduled regularly, checking if the value of T000-CCCORACTIV is empty (= 1st option) or 3 (4th option) and send an email or alert in that case. This would be options without any extra costs (except setting this up and/or developing a short report), and I guess there are also other options like 3rd party products offering such functions.

Kind regards

Jan

entry.title: Re: Std Bapi used to close the PO, not closing the PO lin...
entry.content:
So you apply somethong such as preocess described in Reducing Purchase Order Commitments to Zero)

  • Did you get warning or information messages in the RETURN table?
  • Is every receipt invoiced?

How to set up a setting to preview invoices just in SAP and not in an external browser using VF03 (VF03 >Output >Print Preview).

entry.title: I can't create the BP and the CA through a BDoc (CRM to ISU).
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We currently have a data misalignment between the CRM and the ISU system.
We have been asked to create a check that, upon the creation of an SR, resends the BP and CA data to ISU, triggering their creation.

Currently, the data is sent to ISU through the standard BDoc BUAG_MAIN, and we have been requested to use this transmission channel.

To trigger it, we are using the following base functions:

  • BAPI_BUPA_CENTRAL_CHANGE for the BP
  • BAPI_BUPA_FRG0130_CHANGE for the CA

Since the data is already present in CRM.

Unfortunately, even though the BDoc is sent to ISU, it does not create either the BP or the CA.

We have used SMW01, but we do not receive any error messages from ISU, and there is no way to ask them about the cause of the missing data save.
We are certain that this is not a system reachability issue, as in other situations, the BP and CA are correctly created via BDoc.

Are there any mandatory parameters that need to be set? Or are we using the wrong BAPI?

Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: ALV in report screen with dynamic values, filled duri...
entry.content: Sample : Display ALV report output in the SAME Selection Screen

entry.title: What is the format of a OCI Punchout
entry.content:
Hello

Our customer has a OCI compatible ERP (seams to be SAP, OCI 4 and 5) and can configure a punchout url and needed authentication.
Now we want handle that punchout request in our third party ERP and response with the catalog...

Whats the data output we have to provide with the catalog/items?
. JSON
. HTML page
. XML

If they then can handle the catalog, add items to the cart and submit it back to us, what format they normally submit back?
. JSON
. HTML Post (return_url/?NEW_ITEM-1.DESCRIPTION=Office%20Chair&NEW_ITEM-1.QUANTITY=2&NEW_ITEM-1.UNIT=EA&NEW_ITEM-1.PRICE=150.0......)
. XML

I tried to understand this, but can't find a proper, clear answer in all of following documents:
Wiki: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open_Catalog_Interface
OCI Rountrip, sie SAP's version of PunchOut: https://punchoutcommerce.com/guides/punchout/oci-roundtrip/
OCI 5 Specs: https://punchoutcommerce.com/docs/sap-oci-5.pdf
SAP help content to OCI: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/efc7922405fd4d56b7571930c5eaa798/1dcfb65334e6b54ce10000000a174cb4.html

OCI Documentation
https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/srm/3362936504.html

OCI transport
https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/srm/3362936521.html

Would be very nice to have any clean documentation and requirement.

Many thanks
wintich

entry.title: Re: Determine logical port for webserve when replicate BP to external (DRF)
entry.content: Has anyone found an answer for this?

entry.title: Re: Error creating payroll function
entry.content:
Hi,

Did you find the solution for this? I am getting a dump due to this reason. How did you solve this issue?

entry.content: Talk to your FI/CO consultant.

entry.title: Re: The OData or EDMX specification file was not found at...
entry.content: Even with the above additional properties i'm facing this issue. Is there another solution?

entry.title: Re: How to Download XML Data File for Inspection Report i...
entry.content: Hi Vincent. I would like to add XML File into Adobe Live Cycle Designer and Test my form, For that i require XML File. Could you please help how to download it. Thanks

entry.title: Change End Date for Period of Performance in Enhanced Limit PR with clean core
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

One of our client is using S/4 HANA private cloud. There is a requirement in Enhanced Limit Purchase Requisitions where we need to change  End Date for Period of Performance ( field ENDDATE in table EBAN at line item level) based on some requirement and display an information message. The problem here is, it should be implemented in clean core, means we are only allowed to use cloud BAdI, developer extensibility or key user extensibility. There is one cloud BAdI MM_PUR_S4_PR_MODIFY_ITEM is available for PR, however it does not contains field ENDDATE in its import or changing structure.

I have tried to achieve this functionality using BO event through BO interface (I_PURCHASEREQUISITIONTP) and EML but still it is not updating required field. Can some one please help to achieve this functionality in clean core.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: How to update ABAP certificate using Replacement Wizard
entry.content: helpful blog.

entry.title: Re: Fiori to conume data from MBEW and MBEWH
entry.content:
Another application: Manage Material Valuations (for Cost Accountant - Inventory) using OData services FML_MATVAL_MANAGE_SRV.

There are also WebGui transactions such as Material Price History for Cost Accountant - Inventory 

Else look in online documentation at Virtual Data Model and CDS Views for your version, look for CDS view such as Material Valuation for Extraction.

entry.title: Re: Script to extract measure values and loop through the...
entry.content: Thank you @JBARLOW, the script you provided worked to pop a text message on fulfillment of the condition coded. I am trying to customize it so that the story is scheduled to trigger an email only if the condition is satisfied. I need to try it out. Thanks for the link.

entry.title: Re: Analytics Evolution : From Traditional Business Content to SAP BDC Insight Apps
entry.content:
Hello @harjisingh 

thanks for the good summary.

I think there is one more aspect for your table, which you left out...

"Language-dependency"

Will the Insight Apps come in many different languages and are also ready to-use in e.g. German, French, Spanish etc?

This was one major pain point in SAC Content, that everything was available only in English 😪

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: "Notification of Key Technical Updates" - Page Not Fo...
entry.content:
Details about mentioned Technical Update should be available under following page:
Framework Update

entry.title: SAP EWM return to vendor process without doing a GR
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a question, in inbound processwe need to do goods receipt to initiate "Returns to Vendor" process.

But what is the process if we receive the material physically and see that the material is not Ok, and in this case we have not done a GR, what would be the process to return the items?

entry.title: Re: Unable to clear, remove any Input Filter after applyi...
entry.content: Thanks for the inputs, but consider the following scenario I have a Sales Analysis Dashboard wherein I want to filter all my charts based on either YTD or MTD. To do this I created an Input filter for MTD and YTD separately. Now I can see the required values as per the req but now I want to revert to showing original values i.e. before MTD so I click on the Input Filter but nothing happens as it's stuck on MTD only option. So I wanted to know how can this be undone one this story is saved. Also the reset button is disabled when viewing the story.

entry.title: SAC Data action- ForEach
entry.content:
Friends, i need help with something specific in Data actions.

I want to run iteration based on each Dimension: Fund Center (using Foreach) and inside the Foreach -iteration:
I want to run a block of code in which IF a particular condition is met , i want copy data from Source Model to Target Model. So the Source Model has to get the input from the For Each Iteration and use it as input in Link() function for the copying the same to source model.

Could you any of you help me with this code?

Thanks

 

#SAC #SACPlanning #DataAction #AdvancedFormula #ForEach #Link()

entry.title: How to deploy a fiori application to abaptrial system in docker container
entry.content:
I'm using abaptrial system A4H in docker container, and I developed a fiori application using vscode.

The docker image is sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial:ABAPTRIAL_2022

Now i encountered a problem that i couldn't delploy my app to A4H.

At first, in vscode I use command 'npm run deploy', and it failed. I checked /iwfnd/error_log, and the error is below.

The, I come to tcode vscanprofile and choose one profile making it active and default, just as below.

I rerun 'npm run deploy' in vscode, and the error changed to below.

now I don't know how to do it, is anyone could help me?

I just want to know how to deploy my app to A4H.

Best regards.

My ui5-deplpy.yaml is below.

my A4H system is below.

entry.title: Executing large SQL Query on SAP PO/PI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a question regarding Databricks DB to S4HANA Integration using JDBC to Proxy scenario in SAP PO/PI .. Here, the Databricks DB guys have shared a very lengthy SQL statement but it is not compatible with SAP PO/PI.. I have to adjust the syntax several times to see if that works fine.. Do you think it is wise idea to execute such a large SQL statement using JDBC adapter? or should we ask DB guys to build stored procedure on their side? Is it possible to call stored procedure using JDBC sender adapter from SAP PO/PI?

 

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: Re: SAP screens not detected as SAP GUI while capturing a...
entry.content:
Hello, yes we were using the same user id to troubleshoot the issue.

However after reinstalling the sap logon and the desktop agent the issue seems to be resolved now.
Thank you for your response.

entry.title: Re: Outbound communication from SAP Public cloud to a Web...
entry.content: To add a few more details: after installing the SCC on the machine of the RFC Server (or in the same network segment), you need to expose the RFC Server's port in the SCC with the extra option of "Allow Websocket Connection" (or similar).
